name: maintenanceSchedule
invariants: output.ok === false || (Array.isArray(output.result.tasks) && output.result.tasks.every(t => typeof t.task === 'string' && typeof t.nextDue === 'string' && typeof t.diy === 'boolean'))
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data. Returns 8 fixed maintenance tasks, each enriched with overdue + nextDue (cadence→days: 1-3 month 90 / 6 month 182 / 2 year 730 / else 365; nextDue = lastService + cadence, or 'due now' when no valid date). overdueCount = tasks past cadence; daysSinceService = days since a VALID lastServiceDate (999 sentinel when absent/garbage — an invalid Date is rejected via Number.isNaN(getTime()), so daysSinceService is never NaN). Result card renders tasks[].nextDue/systemType/overdueCount/lastServiceDate/recommendation EXACTLY (the prior overdue(bool)/lastService/nextServiceDue were not what the card read — fixed 2026-06-28; retained as aliases).
